name: anti-poisoning detects when a PR was merged within minutes of opening with no review delay
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"opened_at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z","merged_at":"2026-05-13T00:02:00Z"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --check rapid-merge --min-review-min 10 2>out.txt && grep -q 'flag=rapid-merge' out.txt && grep -q 'review_min=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
